title: Flippin' Ores
description: A simple resource pack that adds some random rotation/flipping to the minecraft ore blocks!
body:
## A simple resource pack that adds some random rotation/flipping to the ore blocks!

### It affects:
- All Stone Ores
- All Deepslate Ores
- Nether Quartz Ore
- Nether Gold Ore

## Some example images (and by some I mean just two):

### Stone Iron and Coal Ores:
![Stone Iron and Coal Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a8d6fee2f4d3dbaf2b90e7f0ed54fb7872dba5c.png)

### Deepslate Diamond and Redstone Ores:
![Deepslate Diamond and Redstone Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0756dcc7ad0a72263f5c62d1d03a92c979faeff2.png)

It is also compatible with resource packs that affect the ore textures
